SOUNDBRETT.SettingsDirHint: The path to the main folder of your sounds (e.g., 'worlds/my-world/sounds').
SOUNDBRETT.NoSounds: No sounds found in this folder or its subfolders!
SOUNDBRETT.RefreshHint: Rescan the sound folder (new files appear after a refresh)
SOUNDBRETT.RenameHint: Leave empty to reset to the file name.
SOUNDBRETT.PreloadMissing: Could not preload "{name}" — the file may have been moved or removed.
SOUNDBRETT.RoutingTargetHint: Choose who hears newly started sounds. The GM always hears them.
SOUNDBRETT.RoutingDialogHint: Select who hears this sound. The GM always hears it.
SOUNDBRETT.SoundMissing: Could not play "{name}" — the file may have been moved or removed.
SOUNDBRETT.SettingsThemeHint: Visual style of the Soundbrett window. Affects only appearance, never function. The WFRP look reuses graphics from the WFRP4e game system and is offered only when that system is active.
